note: Every entry is a real, public, non-fork repo owned by IDC. Descriptions come from the repos themselves. Counts on the site are computed from this file — the honest count IS the count.

entries.name: AGIF Spec
entries.description: AGIF — Agent Intelligence Format. Open v0.1 draft: typed signals, intent profiles, SHA-256 provenance chains for agent-consumable intelligence. MIT.

entries.name: Iron Canvas v4.1
entries.description: Adaptive multi-agent design orchestration methodology. SOLO/SWARM/MISSION modes, phase gates, Awwwards-grade verification.

entries.name: Build Orchestration
entries.description: Agent skill for orchestrating multi-step software builds — planning, dispatch, and verification discipline for agent crews.

entries.name: YPE Pipeline
entries.description: YouTube playlist visual intelligence pipeline — extract, analyze, and synthesize insight from long-form video at playlist scale.

entries.name: Dogfood Readiness
entries.description: Evidence-first dogfood readiness audit toolkit and agent skill — is this thing actually ready to use? Prove it.

entries.name: NeuralForge Memory Mastery
entries.description: The Memory Governance Layer — trust, verification, and portability for agent memory systems.

entries.name: Forge Recall
entries.description: Memory governance: audit, verify, and surgically enhance any existing agent memory store.

entries.name: Forge Genesis
entries.description: Memory governance: bootstrap a complete governed 6-layer memory system from zero.

entries.name: Forge Hivemind
entries.description: Memory governance: cross-agent, cross-family memory consensus — sync, arbitrate, converge.

entries.name: NorthStar Bootstrap (NBB)
entries.description: NorthStar Bootstrap edition — the NorthStar framework ecosystem's shell-native bootstrapper.

entries.name: NorthStar CLI (NBCLI)
entries.description: NorthStar Bootstrap CLI edition — TypeScript command-line entry into the NorthStar build framework.

entries.name: Garnet
entries.description: Garnet — Rust rigor. Ruby velocity. One coherent language. A dual-mode systems/scripting language in active development.

paid_listings.name: AgentPact Signal Feed — Starter Key
paid_listings.description: 1,000 requests/month to GET /v1/signals — AGIF-typed, provenance-hashed agent-economy intelligence behind a working HTTP 402 paywall. $19/mo launch pricing. Live checkout.
